name: Cherry Mash
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the sweetened milk, powdered sugar, cherry creamy frosting, Maraschino cherries, margarine, and vanilla until well combined.
2. Grease your hands with butter and form small balls from the mixture. Place them on a baking sheet lined with wax paper.
3. Refrigerate the balls for at least 8 hours to firm up.
4. In a double boiler over low heat, melt the chocolate almond bark until smooth.
5. Remove from heat and dip each cherry ball into the melted almond bark, allowing excess to drip off.
6. Roll the dipped cherries in crushed peanuts until evenly coated.
7. Place the coated cherries back on the wax paper-lined baking sheet.
8. Refrigerate for at least 8 hours to allow the coating to set.
Note: Ensure all ingredients are room temperature before mixing and handling for optimal results.
